title: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites
impact: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

updates.content:
Title: Possible delays or problems when accessing SharePoint Online

User impact: Some customers have reported issues with accessing the service, or using features in SharePoint Online.

Current status: We’re looking into your reported issue and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within one hour.

Title: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites

User impact: Users may not be able to load the search bar in SharePoint Online sites.

Current status: We've reproduced the issue in our environment, and we're reviewing traces collected while the issue is occurring to pinpoint the source of the failure.
 
Scope of impact: This event impacts any user attempting to use the search bar in SharePoint Online.

Next update by: Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 6:30 PM UTC
